name: elasticmorphsearchbar
title: Elastic Morph Search Bar
description: A "God-Tier" Elastic Morph Search Bar (#263). Features: - Right-Side Elastic Expansion: High-stiffness spring expansion for a rubbery feel. - Kinetic Icon Travel: The magnifying glass rotates 180deg and moves to the end of the bar. - Subtle Glass Close: A sophisticated glass-surfaced 'X' icon for minimalist control. - Cmd+K Command Hub: Hotkey support for quick terminal-style searching.
